creator: gui@function.com
text:
Dear Sir

Failed to install pear from /usr/ports/devel/pear.
Tried on 2 machines.  Got same error.
1st machine is running Freebsd 6.2, php5 and apache2.2
2nd machine is Freebsd 5.4, php 5 and apache 2.2.

Thank you.
Gui


home# cd /usr/ports/devel/pear
home# make
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
=> pear-1.6.2.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://freebsd.unixfreunde.de/sources/.
pear-1.6.2.tar.bz2                            100% of  283 kB  104 kBps
===>  Extracting for pear-1.6.2
=> MD5 Checksum OK for pear-1.6.2.tar.bz2.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for pear-1.6.2.tar.bz2.
===>  Patching for pear-1.6.2
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for pear-1.6.2
===>  Configuring for pear-1.6.2
home# make install
===>  Installing for pear-1.6.2
===>   pear-1.6.2 depends on file: /usr/local/include/php/main/php.h - found
===>   pear-1.6.2 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/php/20060613/pcre.so - found
===>   pear-1.6.2 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/php/20060613/xml.so - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if devel/pear already installed
*** Signal 11

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/pear.
home#


what is on my machine:
